title: Farmer's Delight TFC
description: Adapts Farmers Delight to the world of TerrafirmaCraft.
body:
======================================================================
>**Terrafirmacraft** and **Farmer's Delight** mods are required for the mod to work properly

======================================================================




>**Completely adapts Farmers Delight to the world of TerrafirmaCraft**
.

![cooking-farmers-delight-from-tfc-resources](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/WXhDTEXL/images/f8d7d8449f7a3129787087a89aae3ceb8c276326.png)

================================================================================
- using resources from the TFC for recipes FD (vegetables, fruit, meat from TFC in your recipes cooking pot)
- behavior of the food decay system for each FD food (food expires just like in TFC)
- adding appropriate nutrients for each FD food (vegetables, proteins, diary, grain, water)
- it is not possible to use ingredients with an expired expiration date ( expired food -cannot be used)
- compatibility of tools and components
- possibility of having to use a fireplace TFC for cooking on a pot from FD

================================================================================
![decay-system-for-foods](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/WXhDTEXL/images/ce17d869495c0b07a7fc9f4493bc0d940d3b9963.png)
